description: Build a restaurant recipe costing workbook in /home/ga/Documents/restaurant_recipe_costing.xlsx. Using the data in the 'Ingredient_Prices' and 'Recipes' sheets, calculate the unit cost, extended cost, total cost, and cost per serving for each recipe. Create a new sheet named 'Menu_Pricing' with columns for Menu Item, Cost Per Serving, Target Food Cost %, Suggested Price, and Gross Profit. Populate this sheet with the six recipes, applying a 30% Target Food Cost % to calculate the suggested pricing and gross profit. Include a bar chart on the 'Menu_Pricing' sheet displaying the Gross Profit per menu item and save the workbook.
